subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! We have desired to make mention of thee, that thou mayest be assured of the tender care of thy Lord, the Lord of all that is seen and unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قد اردنا ان نذکرک لتکون موقنا بعنایه الله ربک و رب ما یری و ما لایری
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the concourse on high
